creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Oh, I see... that makes sense. However, the problem I'm facing that made me run into this, is that I need libpurple and the jabber backend at the same time. I have to use Hipchat for some stuff, and it does not work with libpurple, but only with the jabber backend. (https://wiki.bitlbee.org/HowtoHipchat)

Having both backends built in does work just fine, so would you mind changing the port config so that both backends will be built, as selected?

Thanks
